hero.title: The operating system for your agency
hero.subtitle: Clients, projects, hours, leave and tasks in one fast, modular platform. On your server, under your brand, in your language.

featuresTitle: Everything that keeps an agency running
featuresIntro: Every capability is a module. Enable what you use — the rest stays out of the way.

selfhost.title: Your server, your data
selfhost.body: schakl. runs wherever you want it: one Docker Compose stack with web, API, worker, database and Redis. Updates are a new image tag; migrations run automatically, before the app boots.
bullets: One compose stack — no scattered services to babysit
Automatic database migrations on every update
White-label: your logo, colors and custom domain
Dutch by default, English built in

docsCta.title: Ready to get started?
docsCta.body: From installation to every module: it is all in the documentation.
docsCta.label: Go to the docs
